Our award-winning Play Kits include:

  • Playthings and books delivered every 2-3 months

  • The Play Guide, which provides essential instructions on ways to play that age up with your child

  • Week-by-week developmental tips and activity ideas

Invest now for the greatest impact on your child’s future

90%

Ninety percent of your child's physical brain growth occurs by age 5.

We’re obsessed with building the best.

  • Built for safety and tested through hundreds of hours of play studies

  • Proven in the real world with millions of families

  • Made with the premium, natural materials you would choose for your child
